title: Rajiv Lochan temple, Rajim
tagline: Rajiv Lochan temple, Rajim — spiritual town of Chhattisgarh

overview.short: Rajiv Lochan Temple is a temple located in Rajim, in the Indian state of Chhattisgarh.
overview.description: Rajiv Lochan Temple is a temple located in Rajim, in the Indian state of Chhattisgarh. It is dated to the 8th century CE. The temple is located in the middle of a courtyard, with four subsidiary shrines at four corners. The temple consists of a mandapa, an ante-chamber, and a sanctum, with the sanctum being surmounted by a shikhara. It is noted for its elaborately carved doorways, pillars, and pilasters, depicting various Hindu gods, goddesses, and other figures.

topPlaces.name: Ramachandra Temple
topPlaces.description: Ramachandra Temple is a temple located in Rajim, in the Indian state of Chhattisgarh.

topPlaces.name: Rajim
topPlaces.description: Rajim is a town which is proposed to be in Raipur district but officially in Gariaband district, Chhattisgarh, India. Rajim is named after Rajiv Lochan Mandir which is the main Hindu pilgrimage temple of Rajim dedicated to Vishnu.

topPlaces.name: Pairi River
topPlaces.description: Pairi River is one of the important tributaries of Mahanadi. The river originates from the Bhatigarh hills located near Bindranavagarh of Gariaband District and it joins the Mahanadi near Rajim, Gariaband district in Chhattisgarh, India.

topPlaces.name: Gobra-Nawapara
topPlaces.description: Gobra-Nawapara is a city and a municipality in Raipur district in the Indian state of Chhattisgarh.

items.note: Ramachandra Temple is a temple located in Rajim, in the Indian state of Chhattisgarh.

Rajim is a town which is proposed to be in Raipur district but officially in Gariaband district, Chhattisgarh, India. Rajim is named after Rajiv Lochan Mandir which is the main Hindu pilgrimage temple of Rajim dedicated to Vishnu.

Pairi River is one of the important tributaries of Mahanadi. The river originates from the Bhatigarh hills located near Bindranavagarh of Gariaband District and it joins the Mahanadi near Rajim, Gariaband district in Chhattisgarh, India.
Gobra-Nawapara is a city and a municipality in Raipur district in the Indian state of Chhattisgarh.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Rajiv Lochan temple, Rajim?
faq.a: The best time to visit Rajiv Lochan temple, Rajim is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Rajiv Lochan temple, Rajim?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Swami Vivekananda Airport, Raipur (28 km) and the nearest railway station is Raipur Junction (41 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Rajiv Lochan temple, Rajim?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Rajiv Lochan temple, Rajim at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Rajiv Lochan temple, Rajim?
faq.a: Stays in Rajiv Lochan temple, Rajim start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Rajiv Lochan temple, Rajim?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ramachandra Temple, Rajim, Pairi River, Gobra-Nawapara.
